title: ericoides lanatum
intro: Ericoides lanatum, also known as Bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to acidic soils in Europe and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, derived from its high concentration of arbutin and other compounds. The health benefits of Ericoides lanatum include its potential to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and even help manage certain types of cancer, as well as its use in traditional herbal preparations to treat various conditions. Herbal preparations of Ericoides lanatum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support urinary health and reduce inflammation in the body.
